input_context_required: Project schemas and existing architecture decisions
task_boundaries: Define versioned domain, recognition, model-manifest, and archive contracts
Do not implement screens, platform adapters, training loops, or executable task decomposition
output_required: Fixtures or examples for every shared interface
verification_required: Backward/forward archive compatibility tests appropriate to the version policy

task_boundaries: Build shared user flows and Android platform adapters
Keep recognition offline and off the UI thread
Do not add accounts, telemetry, cloud sync, or post-MVP platforms
output_required: Local album persistence and managed-image storage
verification_required: Instrumentation proof for camera/gallery, privacy, persistence, restart, search/filter, and transfer

input_context_required: Accepted model manifest and recognition contracts
task_boundaries: Build reproducible dataset, training, evaluation, ONNX export, and runtime integration
Do not use user photos or corrections as training data
Do not approve a model without licensing, equivalence, accuracy, size, and latency evidence
verification_required: At least 80 percent held-out top-five accuracy
Median inference below two seconds on the selected device

task_boundaries: Independently challenge correctness, privacy, portability boundaries, and release readiness
Do not weaken acceptance thresholds or silently change product scope
verification_required: Inspect metadata removal and private storage
Test unsupported images and corrupt archives
